titles.text: 熱血硬派くにおくん 番外乱闘編

descriptions.text: Double Dragon II is a 1990 beat 'em up video game developed by Technōs Japan for the Game Boy. Although it is the second Double Dragon game released for the Game Boy, it is unrelated to the arcade and NES game Double Dragon II: The Revenge. The game is a localization of the 1990 Japanese Game Boy game Nekketsu Kōha Kunio-kun: Bangai Rantō Hen (熱血硬派くにおくん 番外乱闘編; "Hot Blooded Tough Guy Kunio: The Further Brawls), which was part of Technōs Japan's Kunio-kun series. The graphics, music, and storyline were changed for the English version of the game. In Japan, it was re-released for the Nintendo 3DS Virtual Console on August 8, 2012.
